notes.comparison_chart: Two-panel grouped bar chart: top for code coverage, bottom for branch coverage.
notes.generator_regexes: Some Django targets use simplified practical regexes for generation because the full validator regex is too complex for the graph generator.
notes.statistics: Paired two-sided sign-flip permutation tests compare RegexInstantiator against each other tool by run_index and target.
